name: Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, and cocoa.
2. Stir in the milk and melted butter until well combined.
3. Spread the mixture into a 9-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle 1 cup brown sugar mixed with 3 tbsp cocoa over the top of the batter.
5. Pour 1 3/4 cups hot water over the sugar layer.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
7. Serve warm or cold, with or without ice cream.
